creator: dryice@dryice.name
text:
- update to 2.0rc7
	  At http://cheetahtemplate.org/download.html the upstream author says:

	  "The 'rc' in this release name only indicates that we have
	  yet to update the documentation. The 2.0 code itself is
	  production ready."

	  So I think it's OK to update to 2.0rc7

	- pack it as an egg
	  The (coming) TurboGears-devel port will need it as an
	  egg. And IMO this won't hurt anybody.

	- maintainer CCed

Fix: --- attached file begins here ---
